subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the King, the Mighty, the All-Wise, sent down in truth unto all that dwell in the heavens and on earth, addressing them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک العزیز الحکیم نزلت بالحق لمن فی السموات و الارضین یخاطب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
